title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Pudding, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Katakuri as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is the best... this sweet-ness....}

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know I've tasted it somewhere before!! What is this taste!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is an announcement to all of the islands of Totto Land... Perorin ]>

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YOUUMMYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...The damage will spread no further!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YEesss!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because of the efforts of the Charlotte Family's 35th Daughter, pudding...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mama's tantrum has ended!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I was so scared....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It's going to be okay now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thank goodness!! I thought she would reach our island next...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since ours is right next to cacao Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: CACAO ISLAND - BACK STREET...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: lady pudding was able to use that traitor chiffon....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And her chocolate

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: To save Totto Land admirably.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's amazing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Thank you for this....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I expect- Ed no less from Lady Pudding!!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Thank you so much, lady pudding....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: No...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It wasn't me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: NEAR CACAO ISLAND - AT SEA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey, the ships aren't moving!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The Fishmen in the Sea are....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're the Sun Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Use this chance to sail straight ahead....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a hole at the bottom of the ship....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Captain Jinbeeeeeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Look!! They made a path for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: .....!!...we're gonna plow right through!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: GO!! JINBE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thank you, everyone!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see... they were also the ones who...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stopped the enemy trackers from working!! Why didn't I realize that before...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The following

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They ended up helping me to the very end!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: As expected of jinbe's crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Master Oven!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Is it alright over at CACAO Island!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just now, Brolee brought us some German-effective bullets...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's only a matter of time now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...but more importantly... I can't for- give...

dialogue.speaker: Katakuri
dialogue.text: That little kid who defeated Katakuri....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Thanks, you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please take care of jinbe, straw hat!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
